blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
